query: SELECT id, email, phoneNumber, cardBrand, lastDigits, isActive FROM card_tokens ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3sXv1KbJbJwGeEk.root --database EvfwZtiEFS3QsRSJSXhBhm --execute SELECT id, email, phoneNumber, cardBrand, lastDigits, isActive FROM card_tokens ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
